headline: 3M investors are still waiting for a more 'consistent' growth story
summary: 3M (MMM) stock is jumping on Tuesday after the manufacturer raised its full-year guidance. This comes amid 3M's turnaround plan, where the company has turned its attention toward simultaneously simplifying operations and boosting innovations. CFRA Research analyst Jonathan Sakraida highlights what this could all mean for the company, especially as it transitions into gaining more exposure to AI data centers.

content.title: 3M investors are still waiting for a more 'consistent' growth story
